docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $634.66 FILED BY THOMAS SWAN SIGN CO INC AS TO DEFENDANT K C GLASS INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
